channel.title: Shreyas Korad — Writing
channel.description: Articles and insights on learning design, gamification, and L&D strategy.

item.title: A weekly execution memo for managers and team leads
item.description: For Leaders and builders in gamified learning, modern L&D, data/analytics, and behavior science., this addresses retrospectives produce actions, but ownership breaks before execution in the project retrospective with first-pass quality.

item.title: In retrospectives: checkpoint scoring that cut rework in two weeks
item.description: A gamified checkpoint ladder gave one team lead faster decisions and lower rework in two weeks.
